Give them a chance and you will not be disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex MISIUKEVICH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNe0AwxC4bYJ4ovSZvSbxMS7WY_mRnKbUFwydFUzV2jyue=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found Spartan roofing on FB and decided to meet to get their  estimate. Mike was really good and explained everything I needed. Offered to consider a few options to make sure that I'm fully confident and satisfied.  The price was really good too. Everything happened as promised from early morning arrival to the moment when everything was completed. Mike came next day just to make sure that there was no nails or garbage missed. Great sign of respect and responsibility. Really appreciated. This company is solid. All guys are super friendly, professional and experienced. I'm hiring them for my new gutters. This company you can trust your business and any issues with your  roof. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChh_f-wQE&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-2-23"},{"Name":"Jack Nickel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQjnQqhYbFQvkIWYDWSt3S6XOnhEN1rko4qClcyw2nuquXvGx-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roof was 24 years old and I knew that the cladding on my two chimney chases was in bad shape. I contacted several roofing companies but Michael at Spartan was the only one willing to do the whole job. Before making a final decision I spoke with an individual who had his roof replaced by Michael. He told me he was very happy with the work and the only problem he had was chasing Michael down to pay him. This individual also mentioned that Spartan had replaced a roof across the street and that the work had originally been contracted to Penfolds but that they had subcontracted the work to Spartan. I had also been talking to Penfolds but their quote was roughly 50% higher than Spartan's for the roof portion alone. Spartan was clearly the best choice.

I decided to go with the Landmark PRO shingles and I am glad I did. They are a heavier shingle as evidenced by the difficulty in cutting them. I was impressed with the work ethic of the crew. It was difficult to get them to take a break even though it was quite hot.

The main chimney chase was clad in channel cedar and was roughly 25 feet high. The original builder had not flashed the top of the chimney and when Michael pulled the bottom siding off it was clear that the base structure was totally rotted and that all the plywood and siding on two sides had to be replaced. He dove right in, fortified the structure and replaced the plywood and siding and ensured that it had proper flashing so the problem would not happen again. All of this was done by ladder from sloped ground - truly amazing!

I am very happy with the quality of work done and I have no reservation in recommending Michael and Spartan to my friends and family. I feel lucky to have found him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqsjfPw&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-6-24"}]

[{"Name":"Matt Bright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4MX-z--o26vX5Lb_CA_WPjiZPATJYIvxauVHezVeG6zqSMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rhamil and the Great West Enterprises crew are next level roofing installers.
GAF Master Elite Certified Roofers that came with GAF Golden Pledge, 25 year labour and 50 year limited manufacturers warranty.
Our roof was coming due for replacement. My neighbour and I did loads of research and received quotes and interviewed about 6 different roof installers. Rhamil and Great West Enterprises ticked all the box’s.
I had issues with our EPDM Hidden Gutter system. It was terrible. Rhamil said his team could remove this system and we could install a new standard gutter system. Great idea. No more rotting wood facia boards and failing rubber membrane.
Rhamil answered all problems with solutions. His team were very courteous, professional and turned up when they said they would, rain or shine. Their roofing removal and installation were exceptional, using roofers on their team adding to decades of experience.
Great West Enterprises are a great, professionally run, safety orientated, family run business.
Beware of businesses that sell you a roof replacement but bring in sub contractors to do the work.
You cant go wrong with Great West Enterprises Ltd when it comes to roof installations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIXZAXtgcGmzZ1yZ32otYo&fid=0x0:0x665bdd48cc811345"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Rudi Schantli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxk_2CTAxAr19DVpEoBJmLNWcIGiSjN2gUXUMo9tSUv6F9o4UyNg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After meeting with several other roofing companies and doing my own roofing homework. Look no further. J Murphy’s Contracting (James) had renovated two bathrooms of neighbours and were very happy with the results. I am a 61 year old woman who has NEVER done a reno.  I have no DYI skills and was terrified of doing a reno.
After living in my townhome for 20 years it was in desperate need of an update and repairs.
James listened carefully to what I wanted. Due to my lack of knowledge he would provide suggestions, especially when it came to priorities and how to get the biggest bang for my buck as I’m retired on a fixed budget.
I had my kitchen and bathroom gutted and reno’d. All the floors were changed and the wall, doors and ceiling were painted. I had new light fixtures installed as well as new bathroom sinks and quartz countertops in all bathrooms. James provides a detailed payment scheduled based on milestones. Other than a small deposit, you don’t pay James until the milestone is reached. That offered me such peace of mind.
I don’t know how he does it but if you need to contact him he is there. He responds to texts in second/minutes. He has answered my calls when away at a sporting function. James is there for you when you need him.
His employees and subcontractors are very skilled and helpful. I had all the help I needed in making design choices and I needed a lot of help as I was new to everything.
Everything is complete. A couple of very small things needed tweaking and James had it taken care of right away. Marco provided the quote and came back to seal the corner and clean the roof and gutters of all debris. He also showed me photos of the work done so I could see everything was thoroughly cleaned. A few days later, a deluge of rain came, which exposed a blockage at a bend which caused water to spew from the joint and onto my deck. Although past 9 p.m. Joe came by and cleared the plug (this meant getting on a ladder in the dark while the ice cold water streamed down his arm and front...and not once losing his patience, even when the joint was stubbornly stuck and the blockage would not easily clear while his hands froze.  The poor guy below securing the ladder and standing under the waterfall was similarly saint-like). Joe then checked all around the house to make sure there were no other issues while still soaked! I suspect most companies would not have made a nighttime call during a December rainstorm, and I was extremely grateful (the noise alone from the gushing water hitting below would have meant a sleepless night). It looked like it had sunk about 4 inches. In the room below, the drywall was damp and it was clear there was a significant problem.

Wojtek took some pieces apart to get an initial look and outlined a reasonable work plan. Michael and Dustin carried out the work over the course of a week and a half, first bracing the porch roof, then removing all the wet material. It turned out there was no support post or footing, just a 2x6 resting on a rock. So they started from the ground up, building proper support including a cement foundation and proper posts. Then they carefully re-did the finishes so that the house looked exactly the same – but not sagging, of course.

It was a unique and fiddly project which they carried out professionally. Each evening they cleaned up, covering the structure they were working on, and ensuring there were highly visible barriers to ensure no one coming onto the property stumbled. Their communication each day was excellent. The cost was reasonable.

I would recommend Wojtek and Atrial Building Solutions to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnS2TzmKjmPZ8oMEPXObL_rAkSviehSGjqGvxKfdVq6T7fYv3dLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wojtek and his team replaced the siding on my house with great attention to detail. They worked well with the other trades we had in at the same time.  I would recommend them to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tyson P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVboXwgfPgG7PM4iq9IIXp-CFPw9DW6K-s2l66XxJ8VOrkjhZ3FyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"John quoted us $750 to install two metal bathroom vents on the roof at approximately 22 ft high. After looking it up, the vents themselves cost about $50 each, so the majority of the cost was for labor.

A foreman completed the installation and also did a quick roof inspection (which was included with the vent installation). The work was finished in under an hour, which was efficient . Especially considering it was done on a rainy day. While I do feel for the person working in those conditions, the job was completed as promised.

The inspection was documented with photos provided afterward, which I appreciated.

I did raise a separate concern about a known leak on the shed roof and mentioned this to both John and the foreman. Unfortunately, the foreman was unable to identify it, likely because the inspection photos were taken from ground level. If I hadn’t already been aware of the issue, this leak could have been easily missed and potentially caused more damage over time.

It’s still too early for me to comment on the long-term quality of the vent installation. However, I did notice that leftover cut roofing and plywood pieces, with nails still attached, were left in the attic. This could be a safety concern for anyone working in the attic later on.

Overall, the job was completed efficiently, but due to the missed leak and the cleanup issue, I’m giving a 4 star rating.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqVkUMSmyZLwhJ_vYQLLzM&fid=0x0:0x57b5ab4483b01fe9"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Allen Hassanzadeh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtPUl2TG_euSCVHyX7kGtAePEgFteZz3MEdcq1tJpAzsRTzm5q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Citadel Company has replaced the entire roof of my house in almost 2 days.

[{"Name":"Daniel Hofer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0lTMq1ZIAEhOyOIDbJ_KTe3P4A8Rsm7hmQi73ufLpfHmi9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last week we had yet another heavy rainfall as is becoming quite a regular thing. My good friend called me up on a Tuesday night very emotional and upset that her roof had stung yet another leak. The following morning at 8am I called Taves roofing. Within less than 10 minutes, technician Tim called me back. I gave him some background information on my friend’s situation. He arranged to meet me that same day at her home at 11am for an assessment. Tim came out, checked the damage, gave a quote, then went straight to work on tarping the damaged areas. I figured he would look at it, give a quote, then return days later. I was very surprised and very grateful that he was able to complete the task immediately. After finishing the job, he offered up an amazing price below the already great quoted price. He said Taves was a family run company, and when Mr Taves heard the story of my friend’s situation, he felt compassion and wanted to help her out as best as he could. I was blown away! Not only was their response time and service impeccable, but, to reach out in a show of support to a fellow community member was over the top amazing. I would highly recommend Taves for any roofing dilemma you may be faced with. Thank you Tim and thank you to the Taves family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angus Morrrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcYMnJ2UDE_NWaMiUS9e5C9MspQNsqZsIGQZwjrQxaa5G15CLV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After the first good rainfall I found a leak in one of my roof vents. Tim was able to make it on site an hour after our phone call. He was honest, punctual and easy to deal with. He assessed my roof, and only repaired what required it. I was very pleased with the service I received from Taves Roofing. He has a background as a building envelope engineer so he brings an extra level of expertise to his inspections.  He was extremely thorough, professional, and patient in answering and addressing all our concerns and questions.

If we ever need an inspection down the road there's no one else that we would trust.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBHYmoUdGseaojeEV5_5tvilhJTH0lBfKmB1fIW70zNbjo7yYo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nik was a pleasure to work with. He was incredibly thorough with his inspection, went over his findings in a manner that was easily digestible, and shared any repair / prevention suggestions. I felt at ease working with him and I would definitely use his service again. Highly recommend to all! Thank you Nik!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Livingstone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5Uv8-Al-ahz_dVdrvPKMp3H1LheaGS3J6BP-J2g3tQFnGJ6Hd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nikolas Tanaka at HammerHead Inspection Services did a wonderful job for us by inspecting a property on Harrison Lake that we had our heart set on. He was extremely thorough, polite and respectful and really knew his stuff.

We had a report back from him within 24 hours, and although it wasn't what we wanted to hear, we were glad he was as competent and upfront with us on issues such as subsidence and other issues that could have caused great pain and distress.

I would highly recommend this young man to anyone looking to have their possible property inspected, and would not hesitate to use him again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daisaku David Taguchi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBP3t5vjni6r0QJTgJiC_TaPbfmlc3g8xyNUw9bAMIQW0_ORA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nik is the consummate professional. As an Applied Science Technologist (AScT) in the field, Nik's attention to detail with respect to home inspection, including those of flagging of issues (and potential issues), assessment of the overall condition of assemblies, and formatting of the report is second to none.

We also appreciated how Nik took extra time to explain his observations and recommendations in a patient and courteous manner. The delivery of the report was also lightning quick. I can't recommend Nik enough for your next home inspection.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ethel Enstrom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJr-TnAg4yiPQwlxST9u8a_e_8Qmbt6ROYlJKQXnruQQJS-GA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve purchased and had other homes inspected in various locations over the years. Nik conducted the most thorough inspection we’ve ever seen. We were very impressed not only with the thoroughness of the inspection but also with Nik’s knowledge and his willingness to take the time to review the report with us on site and explain things carefully and patiently. We received the detailed written report within the hour following the inspection. We wouldn’t hesitate to call Nik in future and highly recommend his services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Olver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL624KyazbH_YPj2GkVXexnPZhrKSmg8VVNuBrZoa_13HQD4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nik provided a most detailed inspection report of the property, complete with full disclosure and photos of all areas reviewed. He took the time to explain what he found, offered the necessary action to take to fix the issues and provided timelines for when the work needed to be done. He is very knowledgeable, professional and personable. I would highly recommend his services completely.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Ungerer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJARy26cMu20ueyvJ5A_ihq3y5m9IKUS5pvqqoXU2oqL3xAUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It has been about half a year since Mr. Tanaka inspected my condo and I am still very impressed. He alerted me to issues that were worth addressing immediately, such as a window that failed to seal properly, and concerns, such as risks for water damage, and much more. Many thanks!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beth Nicholson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTRylER-eofzYF2WkmVEjOyvBYEg3NCuChQO-8yR0fe8ZPxootCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nik did a fantastic job inspecting our townhome. He also took the time to point out things we need to maintain and how to do it. He went above and beyond not just inside our unit but also on the roof and other shared spaces that we could bring up to strata. We found the price super reasonable and the service fantastic.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Lisa Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqQo2MfWXOxB3sWHH70G1R9HWkn5PgpA1EKlzHs80bSOZL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have been long term customers here have done many renovation and have stayed loyal to a local business.  However we just bought a can of paint the third time using this particular color all bought from Haney and now the color has changed. They can not match it even though it was their product, their machines matching to thier color codes. We now have to repaint at least 2 full rooms to start because if there are any touch up in other rooms we have NOTHING TO MATCH. Their fix was a refund of the FULL can ( that I paid for)  that was wrong and they still couldn't match. Now we have a huge issue without a lot of support. So now we need buy 2 to 3 more can and spend hours and hours fixing this issue. I can say right now I'm not sure if I'd return.. I get mistakes happen but how you navigate them brings back your customers this isn't bring us back. I will also reach out to the paint manufacturer as they need to know that this is also represents them.
Sorry so unimpressed","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAi_Rsl6SgT3IPa1d4GzSsE&fid=0x0:0x53b06141c4b7452b"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"Jonathan Candy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNFZ7Tx-cnkuD8l1K6dHYB1v3oCjaJM_U_zQoex7x8RZAhECYK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very helpful (Kelly and Co.) when I ordered Cedar lumber for community garden. Excellent delivery with friendly driver who assisted with unloading. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLRJOKOgZDz1CBS_3JgMD2bbfgt9VUhdDiTO5bGhr1q48i_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"There are a few very rude people who work there almost every time I enter this store.  Mainly at the back counter. (Actually many of the ladies at the front tils are lovely)
Today I came in to grab a piece of trim and needed it to be cut.  They were 16 or so feet tall, and I just needed an eight foot piece. When I approached the counter requesting assistance, I was met with an eye roll and a disgusted face, like I had just asked for something horrible.   When I asked if that was okay, he said in a rude tone, depends what it is.  Next time I guess im supposed to drag the 16 foot piece of baseboard to your counter so you can see rather than walking 2 feet to help out a customer??  Sorry you hate your job so much.  Perhaps if I was a man I would get better service?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Payton Nygard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfv1sOzKYoRAcpqYoMYIN1PL2rlj0dyfkHWcQpdDNbAywu0f2w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t normally write reviews, but I was not satisfied with my experience today at Haney Builders.

I came in to get a respirator and a pair of safety glasses after work. When I walked in, I asked the cashier where I could find the respirators as I didn’t want to walk around the store for a long time trying to find them. I was then told where to go.

I got what I needed and went to the cashier to pay. Morgan was my cashier and unfortunately, she was very rude. I put my stuff down on the counter and she asked if I had an account and I said “I don’t think so,” and then she proceeded to laugh at me and scan my items. I don’t know what I did for her to laugh at me but it was not necessary.

I then asked her if I could make an account and she aggressively pointed at the QR code and said “scan that.”","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keith Stone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCHveJZFLvsco3OViw2IfQmmTTv3nO1cYZ-JKuNVT56V2VnAA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service! Even better was passing loaded semi through 50km/h construction zone just past aggasiz.

Not the first time I have seen horrible driving from Haney builders trucks

sure its being used for work with mountain bike in the back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCJNu3rvdorxFMK0oXmj_K&fid=0x0:0x53b06141c4b7452b"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Rahman Waheed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5TL_q620lpDkUtnKYhySxV3AKbq_Jif6bnaB9Z-gNYcXXc6Yy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They've been here since I can remember. title: Landmark Roofing Ltd.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Debra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVL9R4tHwmss1bpD0WAP-WD1hK3xZeNBh0XV0s3h4UB7wmPCr2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🎉I couldn't be happier with the decision to choose Landmark Roofing for our roof installation. David, the owner, was incredibly professional and knowledgeable throughout the entire process. Our roof was installed back in 2020, and it still looks as good as new today, which is a testament to the high-quality workmanship and materials used by Landmark Roofing. We were moving from a cedar wood shake roof to shingles and chose a dark brown that shows no wear to date.

✔ David and his team were prompt, efficient, and made sure everything was done to the highest standard. It was truly the best decision we could have made for our home. The fact that they are accredited by the BBB and recognized by Best of HomeStars further reassures us that we made the right choice.

☎ One of the standout aspects of Landmark Roofing is their ongoing commitment to customer satisfaction. Anytime we have had questions about our warranty or roof care, David has been quick to return our calls and emails, backing up his work and product with exceptional service. It's rare to find a company that not only delivers a great product but also stands by it long after the job is done.

👉 I highly recommend Landmark Roofing to anyone in need of roofing services. You won't be disappointed!

📌 I will have reviews for contractors/businesses we use for flooring, house painting, plumbing, gutters, doors and more in the Abby area. 📷 A picture speaks a thousand words.

📷 Arriving at Job, During Job, Finished Job, Condition Today.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHlNu0Sg&fid=0x0:0x57fdfc5c0ebc7611"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Daniel Witt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtPiQBIDYV1Yq-DvDummr_OnD1AUiImZ9Zh9dBGvuIp9u5x63K-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Although Davie Leite & his Landmark Roofing Co. came to our attention via a glowing referral from a close friend, we did vet 5 companies in choosing. David has a common sense approach that made it easy to understand in layman's terms. Researching him only served to further reinforce he was the correct choice. I am a retired Red Seal Tradesman and Merchant of 32 years, my Wife a Paralegal these past 4 decades. Cheers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO2Ki3uAE&fid=0x0:0x57fdfc5c0ebc7611"],"When":"2022-5-31"},{"Name":"Roamer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX47qdkI7-aPOt5TRbhYzMGrs7QvBADAPVxpzVkJxQeBav5Dsaz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Landmark Roofing is great! They were quick & efficient & did a wonderful job on our new roof. From the very start of the process David was very professional & thorough with his quote. We appreciate that he took the time to answer all of our questions - and I had many of them - & explain our roofing options. He also made sure to address any leaks we had prior to the new roof install. He is gracious, patient and most of all very knowledgeable. David made sure we had the right roof for our wants and needs. Onsite, Robert made sure that work was done properly & that the site was cleaned each night before leaving. He's a very good leader of his crew & did an amazing job. The crew was hardworking & diligent in their work. I highly recommend Landmark Roofing & are very happy we chose to go with them for our new roof. Thanks again boys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Warren Wright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIniZ5bQ7W8Egy_5v-HUd5YU-KYOP81qEcWj7EV8vKfjfRiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough about Dave and Landmark Roofing! We noticed a small leak in our roof on the Sunday of a long weekend and I called Landmark expecting to leave a message and have someone get back to me later. I was pleasantly surprised that Dave answered right away and made arrangements to come assess the problem as soon as possible. He came by with Rob and they found the problem very quickly and performed a small patch. I believe in supporting local companies and Landmark is a prime example of the excellent service available in our community. I highly recommended them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lance Nadeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxwSyeNebwtV4YzciB_62ijXsLxMd9kQ76laxbCaWL5PJywg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Landmark and 2 other companies Wednesday David from Landmark was one of 2 companies to reply and the only company to supply a quote. We had the quote in hand that day and David was able to tentatively schedule the work for the for early the following week. David then arranged for a crew to put tarps on the roof to insure no more water damage that same day. He then confirmed on Sunday the crew would be able to start on Tuesday.

The crew was on time and professional the work site was kept clean as it progressed. The work was completed on time and as quoted.

I am impressed with the whole process and if you knew me I don’t get impressed easily. I highly recommend the team at Landmark.

Thanks
Lance and Mary Nadeau","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob MacPherson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcWI59ykqzy3YTAROT8sEfEg4GRRlglALHGEj_jFz0hJCR3YQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"David is really a great person to deal with as he came by to explain all my roofing needs to me and answered all the questions I had.  He really does truly care about the people he deals with.  He is sincere and compassionate to people and was really an amazing individual to deal with.  I would highly recommend Landmark Roofing to anyone looking at getting their roof done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Carbonneau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXllUFLYI0eyY8SgQcCIWYG7fnzL7emdVLl1LQs20W8dMHWA8k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Over the course of three 12+ hour days, Landmark Roofing’s crew of Rob, Jake, Adam and Graham replaced my old cedar roof with Certainteed Landmark TL shingles; the built-in gutters and a skylight.  From my first meeting with company owner David Leite I was impressed with his knowledge and professionalism.  I received a detailed written quote as well as addresses where I could view various roof colours, products and the Company’s  workmanship.  I appreciated David’s recommendations.  He reassured me that his crew is the best and I can wholeheartedly attest to their punctuality, politeness, work ethic and professionalism.  The  guys were friendly and didn’t hesitate at explaining what stage they were at or what was left to do.  They carefully protected the site for product delivery (the crane operator was really good too!)  and  the demo process and  cleaned up the property at the end of each day. When the roof was  finished they put the planters and patio furniture back in place.  I couldn’t have asked for a better roofing experience and know that I choose the right company for this project.  Thank you David and Crew!   Shirley","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justin King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVQfrVLmT1y3xRl8QeCK98b2NFzx675Jlg-mo-__suZL2jvX-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A+ for Landmark Roofing!  David is professional, kind, courteous and punctual.  His crew is so hard working and kept the property clean and tidy at the end of each work day.  Additionally, the roofers are hilarious.  Lots of compliments on our new roof.  Thank you Landmark Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dorota Charbonneau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhA0pkeaW7XPIJwkjnRlS8tfzazwNbwhzfIbRchb4Osay8FQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark, the owner is very easy to work with. Half the time, they don't show up for work and they constantly postpone the project finish date...really frustrating to work with them from our experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Voice冷眼看世界","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm23Cp-J9YOPi7bz-B68NdgoxwzZb94jttK8ccyx83r2ogapSC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely Disappointed with Mack Kirk Roofing – Unjustified Charges for Minimal Service

On June 23rd, while Mack Kirk Roofing was conducting repairs at our strata in Richmond BC, we approached their on-site crew to briefly inspect mold issues in our bedroom and bathroom ceilings. The workers entered our unit and spent approximately five minutes looking at the affected areas. They suggested the mold might be due to roof leakage and mentioned they would need to conduct further checks and provide a report.

To our surprise, we received an invoice for nearly $500 shortly afterward. The invoice contained only a two-sentence note, with no formal report or detailed findings, and its content contradicted what the workers told us in person. It’s important to note that this quick inspection happened while their team was already on-site for other work — they did not make a special trip from their Langley office for our request.

We contacted their office to respectfully dispute the excessive charge. After waiting nearly two weeks, their response was dismissive, claiming the charge was a “favor” — without addressing any of our specific concerns.

We’re sharing this experience to warn others about what we believe is an unfair and misleading billing practice. If this can happen over a five-minute informal visit, we worry how many others might have faced similar situations over the years.

We strongly urge homeowners and property managers in the Greater Vancouver Area to exercise caution and consider other options before hiring Mack Kirk Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATIePShgFztAHOWxpKuKLf&fid=0x0:0x47e73e685c5653de"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"Amy Bachmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqIi2NsZjhd2tyH-XzoWmcVuTPrQvog_aGWGG_B4duAtUtcoZ5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience with Mack Kirk. [{"Name":"Robert Metcalfe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0BxzzCFmEbq4mzmd67cmpAQmD68M9pdQn-cl9LeY2lzkDdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Professional, attentive to detail, responsive and on time are but few of the accolades we can bestow on Serpentine. With consideration to the cost and scope of the project we were very careful with our selection. Tony was patient with our many questions and observations. He provided accurate and timely responses and allowed us to come to our own conclusion.Once we gave the go ahead Curtis and his crew delivered a a replacement roof beyond our expectations with absolutely no surprises or delays The crew arrived on time each day and left no mess at the end of each.
For a client like me who is particularly careful and attentive to detail Serpentine excelled. We would be happy to provide personal reference for those who ask.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan Airco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCAdydcZQJxR0mzbUyoiuums70N46h7wvAvhc7AtqaGbfEQRmz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'd like to thank the team at Serpentine Cedar, as it's clear they are more than just a roofing company.  We run a heating and cooling company and we were doing a heat pump and tankless water heater conversion, at a home next to their job in South Surrey.  We had to convert the exhaust venting for a furnace and tankless hot water system on the cedar shake roof, with a very steep pitch.  While we had safety harnesses, roofing cleats and ropes, they noticed what we were doing and jumped into action.  They were genuinely concerned about the safety of our team and challenges of our task, and insisted on installing their roof steps to allow us MUCH easier access.  They even removed the steps when we were done.  I can't thank them enough for their concern and their professionalism.  While we did notice the quality of their materials and workmanship, it was an incredible demonstration of decency and generosity to assist us when they could have ignored the situation.  That tells me a lot about their company culture, as we also strive to demonstrate similar 'old-school' values.  Thank you Serpentine Cedar!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDyy7-MuwE&fid=0x0:0x7f422c039b348b30"],"When":"2021-3-17"},{"Name":"Paul Lowry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJfyiXEx9pTE7TFpxcpwoXhhBKUMvW_6XCSGinseno5XbH0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My townhouse strata in Tsawwassen selected Serpentine Cedar to replace our aging cedar shake roofs several years ago. We used a well-qualified, independent professional consultant to monitor and inspect the work, which he found to be well executed and compliant with our specifications. Tony, Kurtis and their team were very professional and cooperative throughout the entire project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diana Mayhew","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI45KEBWE1gAakZIsXjS_beRYv13CEzI5MYUZQ2XZWF6JnhRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Serpentine Roofing is great! Tony and Curtis were a pleasure to deal with.
I have a large house with an RV shed, which is quite an undertaking for any crew to take on.
Tony had some great suggestions for his vision of what would look best. We decided on the hand-split Red Cedar, and it looks fantastic. They fixed up damage on my facia boards, replaced flashings, and relined my hidden gutters.
The whole time they were doing the job, everyone was polite ( no swearing) and was a hard-working crew. Every day before they went home, the employees made sure everything was spotless.
I’m proud of the way my house looks now and I receive many compliments on my roof.
Thank you, Tony, Curtis, and the Serpentine crew!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathy Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXX1N0JHuWd90fF9VySUi7xqOaTJQskmu_C02zdQeuohAHC79dq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tony's crew did a great job of our new cedar roof. Our home not the easiest access as on the water and a great distance from the main road so extra effort involved in removing and bringing down materials - no issues.  Also removed a large (heavy) chimney no longer in use and 4 skylights ! End result was a much cleaner look and peace of mind !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFFFjYfHRwLmmT1_LelUNs&fid=0x0:0xc996be5b9b427cfd"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"R G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYnrpMRqfwG-wZXQYCJRAmzTxaAyQDMwIRfoVd1EdNuj9O_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had my roof replaced and worked with Kevin Lim from Penfolds Roofing, and I couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, Kevin was incredibly patient, helpful, and knowledgeable. He took the time to answer all my questions (and there were many!) and made what I expected to be a stressful project completely smooth.

Kevin’s professionalism, attention to detail, and friendly, approachable manner truly stand out - he’s one of those rare people who go above and beyond for their clients. He followed up regularly, ensured everything was on schedule, and promptly resolved any small issues that came up. Thanks to him, I felt confident and cared for every step of the way.

Penfolds Roofing as a company also impressed me. Their entire team was organized, efficient, and respectful of my home and property throughout the process. The quality of their workmanship shows in every detail, and it’s clear they take pride in their work. Communication was excellent from start to finish, and I always knew what to expect at each stage.

I’m absolutely thrilled with my new roof and the peace of mind that came with choosing Penfolds and working with Kevin. I won’t need another roof for many years, but I’ll be recommending Penfolds Roofing - and especially Kevin Lim - to anyone looking for exceptional service, quality, and professionalism.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Ouellet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIoyk121cvnI5I2ojll9G8rbOSM3-CAugRL4B3pyXeVGsCz7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Penfolds sent a crew of 11 guys and the entire job was done in a day and a half. I really appreciated details like flashing screwed into the roof deck with self-sealing screws instead of just being nailed in.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPGRJILNAm_PzD_YLGOde5&fid=0x0:0xc996be5b9b427cfd"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Slow Mo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ37PM3g1TGzMAtF2LKOoMSy41FP_cEfFs4I2CytvTHIrvetQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sean and the crew at Penfolds were great to work with. The installation crew was proficient and clearly experienced in their craft. We can now feel at ease and confident that our roof was replaced properly. Thank you very much!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Having the work done safely was an important concern of ours and I appreciated that Vantage Roofing took this seriously. The work was just completed this week and so far so good — there hasn’t been any leaks and our roof and gutters are looking in much better shape than they were before. Gary, one of Vantage Roofing’s senior roofers, was our main point of contact throughout the project and he was an absolute star to work with. From the initial inspection for the quote to the very end of the project, he went above and beyond for us several times. We were nervous heading into this whole thing because there are a lot of roofing companies out there and it’s hard to know who to trust. Gary addressed all my questions and concerns with professionalism and patience. You can tell he works with integrity and genuinely wants to do the best by his clients. When we need to do a full roof replacement in the future, Gary and Vantage Roofing will be the first ones we call. After a week of no shows, my wife found Darren and told him about our situation and that we needed to get this done right away as we had someone coming to work on our attic on the Monday,… he simply replied, I can squeeze you in and do it right now that same Saturday.

He was there in under an hour, job was done in 20min (unlike the week of frustration we faced with the other roofing company)… even gave us enough tubing to run the the bathroom exhaust thru.

Price was reasonable, service was incredible!

You can see how this family owned company has successfully lasted over 60 years… service and quality work… that is the secret to a successful company!

100% recommend Darren for your roofing project!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Woodrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEpKgPxXVXlGx3dCY0UtCvcDcF1PxYfyePJj1ZKKJbtcVJrhO9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"McMartin Roofing Review:
5 stars
Location of Work: Walnut Grove (Langley) – Date of Work: October 2022

I’m happy to say that I have found an outstanding roofer which I will use again without hesitation for any future roofing issues that may occur.
Darren McMartin arrived on a Wednesday to examine 4 skylights on my roof that were old and in need of replacement. He also noticed that my 5 attic roof vents were way too small and not up to current code and that a furnace roof vent was also previously installed incorrectly.
I received the estimate for the work that Wednesday night, which I approved Thursday morning and to my pleasant surprise, Darren booked my job for the next day (Friday).
Darren arrived early (yes early!) Friday morning and worked all most nonstop for 11 hours to complete all of the work in the one visit.
I found Darren to be extremely knowledgeable, hard working, neat and that all of his repairs and upgrades were completed to the highest of standards.
His attention to the smaller details such as roof, and drive way clean up, touching up all the flashing and PVC vent pipes with black paint so everything on the roof coloured matched, and the recycling of old materials and packaging made feel assured that the important work was also completed with the same attention to detail and quality. He also reassured me that my shingle roof was still in good shape and had at least another 10 years left (No up-selling).
As it turned out 3 of the 4 old skylights had started to leak and that 1 of them was so badly installed that Darren was surprised that water wasn’t pouring into my home or that a strong wind hadn’t blown it off of the roof.
I now have 4 brand-new high-quality skylights with a 10-year warranty that have been properly installed, as well as adequate roof venting. Darren’s’ 25 years of roofing experience is really evident as observed in the final inspection of his work.
Thanks to Darren and his exceptional, quality work, the weather term ‘atmospheric river’ doesn’t send shivers down my spine any more.
Darren, thank you for everything you did, it is greatly appreciated!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Grant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOmVIpO90wl-bxaW0v4Cz_ANzXaOZaFMI6DLTbYpyVDcJknw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Darren did roof cleaning to my house and detached garage recently. He came on time and worked diligently. It’s clear to me that he’s detailed oriented and very particular with his work. He took steps to clean up after the job and spray down any dirt that kicked up on the walls. I asked him to clear a few of my gutters and clean the exterior which he did. Prices are fair and the quality of the work is high. I would recommend Darren.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chantelle Van Dijk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJgk--fzVoDGiG2GlCaRtsMiEtJLAckqnKVFvzR6nSV7jREQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We contacted McMartin Roofing for a skylight replacement after another company gave us the runaround. We needed the skylight replaced in the next few days. Darren was quick to come check out the existing skylight and provide a quote. What we thought was a standard size (as we were told by the other company), was actually slightly different and not quite as easy a fix as we were hoping. Darren provided us with a couple of different options at reasonable prices and was even able to accommodate the replacement the following day. We're extremely happy with the service we received and would highly recommend McMartin Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neely Morisset","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5SX84-7l2RyzhXGA29OXkYKc-Jtl_Ek124oaZN51kDZ6t7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had our roof redone in Langley. Darren was wonderful to deal with from the first time he came out to look at the roof...to coming back after the bin was taken away to clean up and check for any nails that may have been left. Darren and his crew were really clean and super fast. He also installed 2 sun tunnels and the process was clean and smooth and the results are fabulous. Highly recommend McMartin Roofing for sure!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Theresa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLS9MnsrR6g6sWsafJMlIV6WhkCsAWtiXr99oS550ah8PDgXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Darren and the team at McMartin Roofing just finished replacing our roof, gutters and downspouts.

My husband and I did our due diligence and had a few companies provide us with quotes on getting our roof done.  One quote was significantly more, one was significantly less and one was "give or take" the same.  We then spent time researching the materials each company offered and McMartin Roofing came out heads and shoulders above their competitors.

The works was completed on time and on budget.  I would highly recommend McMartin Roofing for your roof repairs/replacement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gary Chinery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAqyrne6sbI5t-9ll9pkTeu8zXepPpDxJPxkgGNtwgHVBVgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Many years ago we had our roof replaced by McMartin Roofing. I googled McMartin roofing and discovered that McMartin Jr had taken over the business.  We had Darren & a few other roofers give us an estimate.  We were so please with our first roof it seemed obvious to go with McMartin again.  Once again they did a great job, no issues at all.  I would recommend McMartin roofing to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""}]
